entry.title: IDC N0001919D0026 (P00016) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS INFORMATION AND ELECTRONIC SYSTEMS INTEGRATION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE ECP APK FRP10-003 VIA ATTACHMENT 31, AND ADD CLINS AND ADJUSTMENTS AS CONSIDERATION FOR DELIVERY SCHEDULE CHANGES TO FRPS 9,10, AND 11 DUE TO DELAYED DELIVERIES.
